## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce Katie Daire to Marcel Santilli, discuss Homebase's AI strategy, and explore GrowthX's evolving capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is rapidly evolving, raising Series A funding, and significantly expanding their team and technology infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Homebase views AI investment as crucial for company longevity, aiming to become "AI native" while ensuring ROI](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [GrowthX has developed a powerful new workflow engine with enhanced capabilities for content generation and research](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Discussions on content strategy focused on relevance over volume, adapting to changes in search algorithms and AI-driven search](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Company Updates

  - [Raising Series A funding to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Hiring 10 engineers and 5 managing editors](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Developed a new runtime layer and workflow-as-code system](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Building reusable micro-components for various workflows](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Plans to expose more infrastructure to clients over time](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### AI Content Generation Advancements

  - [New assignment generation workflow with complex, auto-generated steps](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Enhanced research capabilities, scraping hundreds of sources per article](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Improved feedback mechanism allowing targeted revisions](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Custom knowledge bases being developed for specific client needs (e.g., Hims)](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Emphasis on relevance over volume in light of recent algorithm changes (e.g., HubSpot situation)](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Discussion on adapting to AI-driven search and maintaining visibility](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Exploration of Homebase's current rankings in both traditional and AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)

### Future Collaboration Ideas

  - [Potential integration of AI search performance into reporting](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [Exploring automated content refresh workflows based on multiple metrics](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Desire for deeper understanding of AI effectiveness and ROI measurement](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule an in-person meeting between Marcel and Katie for a deeper dive into GrowthX capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Plan a follow-up session to set priorities for the next 3-4 months](https://fathom.video/share/26eW9GZTQr9yyGM-dc49sMFjUfhurqeo?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
